nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Now you shall see what I will do to Pharaoh; for under compulsion he will let them go, and under compulsion he will drive them out of his land.”

esv.text: But the Lord said to Moses, “Now you shall see what I will do to Pharaoh; for with a strong hand he will send them out, and with a strong hand he will drive them out of his land.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你現在必看見我要向法老行的事；因為我施展大能的手，他必讓他們離去；我施展大能的手，他必把他們從自己的地趕出去。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你就要看见我怎样用大能的手对付法老，那时他会让以色列人走，甚至把他们赶出埃及！”
